title: Shirataki Noodle Stir Fry with Norwegian Salmon
description: A light and delicious stir fry made with shirataki noodles, Norwegian salmon, and xenial vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the xenial mixed vegetables and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Add the shirataki noodles and cook for 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Add the Norwegian salmon fillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, until cooked through.
Season with soy sauce and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds, if desired.
